creator: kamer@logosoft.de
text:
I have installed FreeBSD 2.2.7 -stable from a CD Disrtibutation.
After compiling a costumized kernel everything works fine.
Then I update to 2.2.8 stable via cvsup.
After compiling and installing this new kernel, I have problems
to acces ISO9660 CD-ROM. /stand/sysinstall always says, that I have
inserted an audio CD.
